# galleon ship cruising on water

Tres Hombres was in Lunenburg, Nova Scotia waiting for a weather window to cross the Atlantic Ocean.

A map markerLunenburg, Canada

Calendar outlinedPublished on January 10, 2018CameraNIKON CORPORATION, NIKON D800SafetyFree to use under the [Unsplash License](https://unsplash.com/license)
